children.text: procure the services of experts or consultants (or of organizations of experts or consultants) in accordance with ; andsection 3109 of title 5

pay in connection with such services travel expenses of individuals, including transportation and per diem in lieu of subsistence while such individuals are traveling from their homes or places of business to official duty stations and return as may be authorized by law.
the procurement of such services is advantageous to the United States; and
such services cannot adequately be provided by the Department of Defense.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: c .—Regulations
children.text: Procurement of the services of experts and consultants (or organizations thereof) under subsection (a) shall be carried out under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense.

children.heading: .—Additional Authority for Personal Services Contracts
children.label: d .—Additional Authority for Personal Services Contracts
A
children.text: are to be provided by individuals outside the United States, regardless of their nationality, and are determined by the Secretary to be necessary and appropriate for supporting the activities and programs of the Department of Defense outside the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: directly support the mission of a defense intelligence component or counter-intelligence organization of the Department of Defense; or

children.label: C
children.text: directly support the mission of the special operations command of the Department of Defense.

children.label: A
children.text: the services to be procured are urgent or unique; and

children.label: B
children.text: it would not be practicable for the Department to obtain such services by other means.
The requirements of shall not apply to a contract entered into under this subsection.section 3109 of title 5
